content.label: Music folder paths
content.description: Comma-separated full Volumio filesystem paths to scan. Example: /mnt/NAS/Music,/mnt/USB/Music,/mnt/INTERNAL

content.label: Maximum albums shown
content.description: Maximum number of albums to show in Recently Added Albums. Values above 1000 are capped.

content.label: Maximum folder depth
content.description: How many folder levels below each music root to scan for album folders. 1 supports Root/Album/Tracks, 2 supports Root/Artist/Album/Tracks, 3 supports Root/Genre/Artist/Album/Tracks. Values above 5 are capped.

content.label: Excluded folder names
content.description: Comma-separated folder names to skip while scanning, for example #recycle,@eaDir,.AppleDouble,video,Sounds.

content.label: Enable album-level playback
content.description: Shows play and add controls on album rows and queues the album's sorted track list. Turn off if Now Playing metadata or artwork does not update reliably on your setup.
